name: renewal-preview-contact-marker
prompt: Support says opening the renewal-reminder preview page can make tomorrow's real reminder disappear. Find the exact code that marks the account as contacted during preview/dry-run, and explain the condition that causes it.

expected.evidence: lastPulseAt is overwritten from clock.iso() when the packet is not a commit and the edge disposition is observe.

successCriteria: Answer names foldPacketEdges or the lastPulseAt assignment
Answer explains that a shadow/rehearsal preview path with observe disposition advances the pulse/contact marker
decoyHints: src/features/retention/reminder-policy.ts contains real reminder eligibility policy but not the mutation
src/features/retention/dry-run-ledger.ts explicitly says dry runs are not persisted
src/legacy/preview-reminder.ts is a dead compatibility adapter
tokenMetric: totalEstimatedTokens = burnedTokens + sub-agent session tokens; each estimate is ceil(serialized chars / 4). burnedTokens remains parent tool_call/tool_result I/O only.
